svg.title: MPG Private AI Deployment — Ditto Architecture
svg.desc: Secure deployment architecture showing data flow from Xero and XPM APIs through Ditto's AWS Sydney-hosted middleware and private LLM engine to MPG staff outputs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Xero accounting API connection for MPG')
sendPrompt('Explain the XPM Practice Manager API connection for MPG')

svg.text: AWS Sydney region · NZ data sovereignty · zero model training

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Ditto middleware protect MPG client data?')
g.text: Secure data processing · pull, process, discard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AWS Bedrock ensure NZ data sovereignty for MPG?')
g.text: Claude via AWS Bedrock · no logging · no retention

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What access controls protect the MPG staff interface?')
g.text: MFA · role-based access · full audit log
